topics.title: ITR12 Personal Income Tax
topics.summary: Tax year 1 March – end February. ITR12 filing season typically Jul–Oct for non-provisional taxpayers via eFiling; provisional taxpayers until Jan.

topics.title: PAYE + UIF + SDL
topics.summary: Employers withhold PAYE monthly (EMP201 by 7th). UIF 1% employee + 1% employer, capped. Skills Development Levy 1% for employers with payroll >R500k/yr.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: Standard 15%. Compulsory registration turnover >R1m; voluntary >R50k. Bi-monthly returns on VAT201.

topics.title: Corporate Income Tax
topics.summary: Standard 27% (year of assessment ending on or after 31 March 2023). Provisional tax paid twice a year; ITR14 due 12 months after year-end.

topics.title: Two-Pot Retirement System
topics.summary: From 1 Sep 2024: contributions split one-third Savings component (accessible annually) and two-thirds Retirement component (preserved). Major change for payroll-admin and retirement funds.
